name: United States 12 Month Natural Gas Fund, LP
summary: PartI What is UNL? The United States 12Month Natural Gas Fund, LP (UNL) is a Delaware limited partnership organized on June27, 2007. UNL maintains its main business office at 1850 Mt. Diablo Boulevard, Suite640, Walnut Creek, California 94596. UNLs shares began trading on November 18, 2009. UNL is a commodity pool that issues limited partnership interests (shares) traded on the NYSE Arca,Inc. (the NYSE Arca). It operates pursuant to the terms of the Third Amended and Restated Agreement of Limite...
